name: How can I get meaningful benefits from structured data generation on a limited budget?
description: On a tight budget, focus structured data generation on your highest-impact pages and a few powerful schema types like FAQPage, HowTo, Product, and Organization.

mainEntity.name: How can I get meaningful benefits from structured data generation on a limited budget?

acceptedAnswer.text:
If you’re on a tight budget, focus your structured data generation on a few high-impact schema types and page templates rather than trying to cover everything.
The 80/20 approach usually delivers most of the value for a fraction of the cost.

Key factors:
- Identify top-performing pages or key revenue drivers
- Prioritize FAQPage, HowTo, Product, and Organization markup
- Use free tools for validation and basic automation
- Avoid over-engineering for low-traffic areas

Practically, start with simple JSON-LD templates you can reuse, and only invest in advanced generation tools when you hit clear limits (scale, complexity, or time).
Revisit the decision every quarter as traffic and priorities change.
A lean, well-targeted implementation is better than a broad but error-prone one.
acceptedAnswer.description: On a tight budget, focus structured data generation on your highest-impact pages and a few powerful schema types like FAQPage, HowTo, Product, and Organization. Use reusable JSON-LD templates and free validators rather than trying to mark up everything across your site.
